name: pier
description: Node.js + TypeScript + PostgreSQL web app (ailaopo.online). AI-maintained — zero hand-code.

deploy.description: Build Docker image, push to Docker Hub, SSH to VPS and run docker compose up -d
deploy.prompt: Run the full deployment pipeline: 1) git add/commit/push, 2) wait for GitHub Actions to complete, 3) verify VPS container is running via SSH

build.prompt: Install npm deps in app/ dir, run npx tsc to compile TypeScript, check for any compilation errors

test.prompt: Run the project's test suite. First read package.json to find the test script, then execute it.

add-routes.description: Create a new Express route file with the standard pattern
add-routes.prompt: Read app/src/routes/auth.ts as a template for route patterns. Create a new route file at app/src/routes/<name>.ts with all CRUD operations following the same express.Router() pattern. Register it in app/src/server.ts. Create EJS views in app/views/<name>/.

add-model.prompt: Read app/src/services/db.ts for the existing schema init pattern. Create SQL migration for the new table, add it to initDB function. Create TypeScript model functions in a new file.

add-view.description: Create EJS view files following project conventions
add-view.prompt: Read existing views (app/views/) to understand layout pattern. Create new EJS templates using layout.ejs, matching the project's styling conventions (gradient backgrounds, cards, disclaimer blocks).
